flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bryan College of Health Sciences fell 38% between 2021 and 2024 (69.8% → 43.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bryan College of Health Sciences rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.8k → $20.6k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bryan College of Health Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
